title: Police on the hunt for five petrol station robbers
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"DANA BAY NEWS -  The KwaNonqaba Police are searching for five suspects following an armed robbery at the Astron Energy garage in Flora Road, Dana Bay, this morning, 12 January.","html":"DANA BAY NEWS - The KwaNonqaba Police are searching for five suspects following an armed robbery at the Astron Energy garage in Flora Road, Dana Bay, this morning, 12 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to the station’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, the incident occurred at about 05:00 and reportedly involved a firearm."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Some staff members were in the building, but nobody was injured.","html":"Some staff members were in the building, but nobody was injured."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, several items, including cellphones and laptops, were stolen.","html":"However, several items, including cellphones and laptops, were stolen."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Should you have information about the robbery or the suspects’ whereabouts, contact Warrant Officer Johan Lubbe on 044 606 5623.","html":"Should you have information about the robbery or the suspects’ whereabouts, contact Warrant Officer Johan Lubbe on 044 606 5623."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Police on the hunt for five petrol station robbers
